message:
Merge pull request #155 from tenzir/topic/ocsf-reference-docs

Add comprehensive OCSF reference documentation

files.patch:
@@ -81,6 +81,10 @@ Some content is auto-generated and excluded from linting:
   source files to SVG. In markdown, reference diagrams as `![alt](foo.excalidraw)`.
   The remark plugin inlines the corresponding `foo.excalidraw.svg` directly into
   HTML for CSS dark mode support. Generated SVGs are gitignored.
+- **OCSF Reference**: Run `pnpm generate:ocsf` for latest version or
+  `pnpm generate:ocsf:all` for all versions. Fetches schema from schema.ocsf.io
+  and articles from ocsf/ocsf-docs. Generated files: `src/content/docs/reference/ocsf/`,
+  `src/sidebar-ocsf.generated.ts`, `src/ocsf-version.mjs`.
 
 ### Linting

@@ -48,6 +48,10 @@ jobs:
       - name: Generate Claude plugins
         run: pnpm generate:claude-plugins
 
+      - name: Generate OCSF reference
+        if: github.event_name != 'pull_request'
+        run: pnpm generate:ocsf:all
+
       - name: Generate docs map
         run: pnpm generate:docs-map

@@ -18,6 +18,11 @@ src/unified-timeline-data.generated.ts
 .claude-plugins/
 src/content/docs/reference/claude-plugins/
 
+# OCSF reference (generated content)
+src/content/docs/reference/ocsf/
+src/sidebar-ocsf.generated.ts
+src/ocsf-version.mjs
+
 # Docs map and bundle (generated)
 public/sitemap.md
 tenzir-docs.md

@@ -5,3 +5,4 @@ pnpm-lock.yaml
 .github/
 public/
 src/content/docs/changelog/
+src/content/docs/reference/ocsf/

@@ -8,9 +8,11 @@
     "build": "astro build",
     "preview": "astro preview",
     "astro": "astro",
-    "generate": "pnpm generate:changelog && pnpm generate:claude-plugins && pnpm generate:docs-map && pnpm generate:excalidraw",
+    "generate": "pnpm generate:changelog && pnpm generate:claude-plugins && pnpm generate:ocsf && pnpm generate:docs-map && pnpm generate:excalidraw",
     "generate:changelog": "node scripts/sync-changelog.mjs",
     "generate:claude-plugins": "node scripts/sync-claude-plugins.mjs",
+    "generate:ocsf": "node scripts/sync-ocsf.mjs",
+    "generate:ocsf:all": "node scripts/sync-ocsf.mjs --all",
     "generate:docs-map": "node scripts/generate-docs.mjs --map",
     "generate:docs-bundle": "node scripts/generate-docs.mjs --full",
     "generate:excalidraw": "node scripts/generate-excalidraw-svgs.mjs",

@@ -5,6 +5,10 @@ description: AI-executable workflow prompts for common tasks
 
 import { LinkButton } from '@astrojs/starlight/components';
 
+:::tip[AI-Optimized Documentation]
+This reference is optimized for AI agents.
+:::
+
 This section contains workflow prompts that AI agents execute directly. Each
 workflow is a verbatim prompt with phased instructions.

@@ -33,6 +33,8 @@ Docs:
         - /reference/functions/**/*
         - /reference/operators/**/*
         - /reference/claude-plugins/**/*
+        # OCSF reference (generated by sync-ocsf.mjs)
+        - /reference/ocsf/**/*
 
 Integrations:
   icon: puzzle
